summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TMS SAAS Phase 2 Master Data Tables and Canadian Tax Calculator. All core APIs functional with 100% success rate on main features and 95.2% on edge cases.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests
minor_issues.impact: Minor - both status codes indicate auth failure appropriately

passed_tests: GET /api/master-data/tax/rates - Returns all Canadian tax rates by province
POST /api/master-data/tax/calculate - Calculate tax for ON (HST 13%), QC (GST+QST), BC (GST+PST), AB (GST only)
POST /api/master-data/carriers-brokers - Create carrier/broker with full Canadian data
POST /api/master-data/customers - Create customer with billing address and tax_province
GET /api/master-data/customers/{id}/tax-calculation - Calculate tax based on customer province
POST /api/master-data/shippers - Create shipper with Canadian address
POST /api/master-data/consignees - Create consignee with delivery requirements
Edge cases (negative amounts, invalid provinces, missing data)
success_percentage: Backend: 100% core functionality, 95.2% edge cases. No frontend testing required.
